headline: Dow spikes by over 1,300, oil prices retreat in ceasefire rally
summary: All three of the major indexes (^DJI, ^IXIC, ^GSPC) closed Wednesday's session with colossal gains — the Dow Jones Industrial Average skyrocketed by over 1,320 points (2.85%) and the Nasdaq Composite surged by nearly 620 points (2.8%) — after President Trump announced that Iran agreed to a two-week ceasefire last night. Yahoo Finance Markets and Data Editor Jared Blikre takes a closer look at the trading day's biggest sector gainers.

headline: Ceasefire, Collapsing Oil, and a Chipmaker on Fire, Wall Street Wednesday Opens on a Different Planet
summary: Just hours before Trump's deadline to "wipe out Iranian civilization" expired, Washington and Tehran agreed to a two-week ceasefire brokered by Pakistan. Oil fell off a cliff. Futures surged. And that was before Broadcom decided to steal the spotlight with the most consequential AI chip deal of 2026.

raw.headline: Ceasefire, Collapsing Oil, and a Chipmaker on Fire, Wall Street Wednesday Opens on a Different Planet

Futures surged. And that was before Broadcom decided to steal the spotlight with the most consequential AI chip deal of 2026.
